assumption: Infrastructure is represented as a static graph
risk_if_wrong: Adaptive rerouting and operational reconfiguration may be understated
review_action: Add dynamic topology or operational response rules

risk_if_wrong: Partial or degraded operation may be ignored

assumption: Load redistributes evenly to functional outgoing neighbors
risk_if_wrong: Real load follows physics routing contracts or operator decisions
review_action: Use sector-specific flow or routing models

assumption: Dependency failure occurs above a fixed tolerance
risk_if_wrong: Real dependencies may be nonlinear hidden or time dependent
review_action: Audit dependencies and test tolerance sensitivity

assumption: Overload failure occurs above a fixed threshold
risk_if_wrong: Real overload may be probabilistic and time dependent

review_action: Use stakeholder and service consequence review

risk_if_wrong: Repair time may depend on crews materials weather and access
review_action: Add repair logistics and resource constraints
